summary: Completed backend testing of bug fixes batch (iteration 19). All 18 tests passed (100%). Verified all 6 bug fixes: 1) Activities showing for students via GET /api/cocurricular/groups/all, 2) User search returns all students/RAs for student users, 3) Events endpoint filters past events by default, 4) Events with include_past=true returns all events, 5) DELETE /api/conversations/{id} deletes conversations, 6) DELETE /api/message-groups/{id}/leave allows users to leave groups.

details: Students can access all co-curricular groups (returned 6 groups)
CoCurricularGroup model fields contact_person and description are now Optional
Groups returned with optional fields as None without validation errors
Students can search users for messaging (returned 2 users)
Removed floor restriction - students can see all students/RAs in tenant
Search with query parameter also works (q=a returned 2 users)
Default endpoint returns only future events
3 past events in database correctly filtered out
Returns 0 events when all events are in the past
Returns all events including past when include_past=true
Returned 3 events (all past events from Jan 30-31, 2026)
Conversation removed from user's conversation list after deletion
Group removed from user's message groups list after leaving

critical_code_review_comments: ✓ CoCurricularGroup model correctly uses Optional[str] for contact_person and description fields
✓ User search endpoint correctly returns all students/RAs in tenant for student users
✓ Events endpoint correctly filters past events using date comparison with current UTC time
✓ Conversation deletion endpoint properly hides messages for the user
✓ Message group leave endpoint properly removes user from group and adds system message
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 6 bug fixes verified working: 1) GET /api/cocurricular/groups/all works for students (6 groups returned), 2) GET /api/admin/users/search works for students (2 users returned), 3) GET /api/events filters past events by default (0 future events, 3 past filtered), 4) GET /api/events?include_past=true returns all events (3 events), 5) DELETE /api/conversations/{id} deletes conversations successfully, 6) DELETE /api/message-groups/{id}/leave allows users to leave groups. Note: Safe disclosure keyboard issue is frontend-only fix (TextInputField moved outside render function) - not tested in this backend-only iteration.
